title: Language Compasses
description: Changes the compasses everyone holds in their hand in the Hypixel lobbys to flags based on their Hypixel language!
body:
# Language Compasses
Language Compasses changes the compasses everyone holds in their hand in the Hypixel lobbys to flags based on their Hypixel language!
## Possible usecases
### Find people
You can find people who speak the same language as you do to play with :D
### Get to know your friends languages
Have you ever wondered what languages your Hypixel friends speak? Just warp them into a lobby and tell them to hold their compass!
## Screenshots
